Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Autumn, the year 199X...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have one new message.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reality is just a series of events and players acting out what they believe to be true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When we accept that fact, our world becomes as real as any other.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reality is but a reflection of our own thoughts and expectations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But... what if we were merely reflections in someone else's mirror?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you prepared to look through that mirror to discover the truth?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't see any other players...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A girl in red approaches me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}oh wow. u haven't even finished makin your char yet... o_O[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}guess the new default skin thing was 4 real. i got dis cool outfit in the patch too[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}not liek it brought in many new ppl... this is kind of a dead MMO these days xD[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}eh, welcome to teh game! cool to seeya round :3[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}we r supposed to be our "alternate selves" rite? uhhhh... yeah =/[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}sooo... what r u gonna call ur char? all i c is "no data" o_O[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}hm... hey, i got a good name for u :3[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}how bout tatsuya? ya thats perfect, imo[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i'll change mine to maya, k? =D[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}o rly? im impressed, i didn't think many people played that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}well if u see any jokers, be sure to rescu me, k? ^^y[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}figures, its been a while hehe. i played that game soooooo much in college T_T[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}oops. hope u cant figure out how old i am... rofl!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}ne way, im usually idling here on my {f 0 1 2}days off{f 0 1 27}... ＞_＞[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}so if ur bored, maybe we can level together. it sux to be lonely =P[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've become acquainted with a player[n]who goes by the name "Maya"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}remember, let's think positive! traesto! xD[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out as well.[n]{f 1 1}
